channel.title: briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesHealthOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In lawsuit, Minnesota accuses Trump administration of 'weaponizing' Medicaid funding
item.description: The federal government said the state should do more to fight fraud and is holding back funds. Minnesota officials say the attack is unfair as the sta...

item.title: When ICE came, Minneapolis created underground health networks. Should other cities?
item.description: The Trump administration's immigration crackdown in Minneapolis forced some families into hiding and catalyzed informal medical networks to deliver cr...

item.title: When Artificial Intelligence Starts Rewriting Reality
item.description: By BRIAN JOONDEPH Artificial intelligence is quickly becoming a core part of healthcare operations. It drafts clinical notes, summarizes patient visit...

item.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
item.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

item.title: Listen: What To Do When Health Insurance Slips Out of Reach
item.description: 2026 has been a challenging year to buy health insurance. Contributing factors include changes to the Medicaid program and hikes to the cost of Obamac...

item.title: What the Health? From KFF Health News: 40 Years of Health Policy
item.description: This month is 40 years since host Julie Rovner, chief Washington correspondent for KFF Health News, began reporting on health policy in Washington. To...

item.title: Trumpâs Cuts to Medicaid Threaten Services That Help Disabled People Live at Home
item.description: Iowa patient advocates say that in the face of federal Medicaid cuts, the state is quietly reducing in-home services that help people avoid being inst...

item.title: Why supporting a shelter for women is now 'kind of radioactive'
item.description: That's how researcher Beatriz Garcia Nice describes the new U.S. stance under the Trump administration to programs addressing gender-based violence.

item.title: Getting the abortion pill via telehealth is more common now. NPR wants to hear your story
item.description: Mifepristone is facing another major legal challenge.
